title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, an AI pioneer and Nobel laureate, discusses his belief that current AI systems may already be conscious and that superintelligence could arrive sooner than widely expected. He expresses concerns about AI-driven job loss, corporate self-regulation inadequacy, and the need for regulatory intervention to address AI safety risks.
